notes: Pairing filenames are normalized as sushi-or-sashimi-name + sake-name.
Text should be rendered dynamically in the app; pairing images are treated as standalone visual assets.
Omakase appetizer, specialty, and dessert images are reserved for the Master Chefs Omakase Experience.
Only the final tidy screenshot package is retained as the design reference set.

chefs.name: Hiroshi Tanaka
chefs.about: Founder and head chef Hiroshi Tanaka brings decades of Edomae training to Sushi Bliss, guiding the counter with calm precision, restrained seasoning, and daily market-inspired sourcing.

chefs.name: Kenji Sato
chefs.about: Sous chef Kenji Sato leads the hot kitchen and finishing station, balancing seared courses, sauces, and timing so each omakase sequence arrives with clean rhythm and warmth.

chefs.name: Ren Mori
chefs.about: Lead sushi chef Ren Mori shapes the counter's knife work and service pacing, translating seasonal fish into precise nigiri, sashimi, and composed plates with quiet confidence.

chefs.name: Aiko Nakamura
chefs.about: Pastry chef Aiko Nakamura creates the final movement of the meal with matcha, yuzu, black sesame, and delicate textures that close the omakase experience cleanly.

menu.name: Ikura Gunkan
menu.ingredients: Salmon roe, nori, sushi rice
menu.chefNote: Bright pearls of ikura that burst with savory salinity.

menu.name: Uni Gunkan
menu.ingredients: Sea urchin, nori, sushi rice
menu.chefNote: Briny, creamy uni wrapped cleanly with warm rice.

sakePairing.sakeName: Kuheiji Eau du Desir Junmai Daiginjo

masterChefsOmakaseExperience.title: Master Chefs Omakase Experience
masterChefsOmakaseExperience.description: A chef-led tasting journey that uses the dedicated appetizer, specialty, and dessert assets outside the standard ordering menu.
